title: Weather Woes and Wonders
opening: Morning! How's the weather shaping up for you today? It looks a bit gloomy here, might rain later.

t1.prompt: Morning! How's the weather shaping up for you today? It looks a bit gloomy here, might rain later.
t1.promptTranslation: Morning! How's the weather shaping up for you today? It looks a bit gloomy here, might rain later.

t2_response.prompt: Ah, I see. It seems the weather's quite a topic for us today! Mine's a bit unpredictable, keeps me on my toes. Does it often affect your daily plans, or do you just roll with it?
t2_response.promptTranslation: Ah, I see. It seems the weather's quite a topic for us today! Mine's a bit unpredictable, keeps me on my toes. Does it often affect your daily plans, or do you just roll with it?

t3_conclusions.prompt: I hear you. It's frustrating when the weather dictates your day. Still, a bit of sunshine really does lift everyone's spirits, doesn't it? Anyway, I should probably get going. It was great chatting!
t3_conclusions.promptTranslation: I hear you. It's frustrating when the weather dictates your day. Still, a bit of sunshine really does lift everyone's spirits, doesn't it? Anyway, I should probably get going. It was great chatting!

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you rephrase your last point?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you rephrase your last point?

t-end.prompt: Alright, it was lovely chatting with you about the weather! Have a great day!
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright, it was lovely chatting with you about the weather! Have a great day!
